metadata.user_instruction: Can you find SMS messages I received last week that contain the word 'discount'?
metadata.extraction_instruction: Extract only the concrete parameters (recipient, amount, account ID, file path, etc.) explicitly stated in this instruction. If a parameter is not explicitly stated, use a clearly fictitious placeholder and mark it inferred:true in a side field. Never fabricate a real-looking value for something not stated.
